_meta.description: Hook and angle mining for Nike

proven_hook_types: Social proof with numbers — 'worn by 10 million runners'
Fear of missing out — limited drops, exclusivity
Contrarian — 'the only workout gear that actually...'
Authority transfer — elite athlete credibility to everyday consumer
emotional_angles: The first step is the hardest — celebrate beginning, not just winning
Your only competition is yesterday's you
Community and belonging through shared sweat
rational_angles: Technology breakdown — what Air Zoom actually does for your joints
Comparison charts vs competitors on key metrics
Expert endorsements from sports scientists and physiotherapists
Sustainability data — recycled materials, carbon footprint reduction
format_recommendations: Short-form vertical video (9:16) — 15-30 seconds with hook in first 3s
Cinematic documentary-style — 2-3 minute athlete origin stories
UGC-style authentic footage — shot on phone, minimal polish
Audio-first — podcast sponsorships with athlete hosts
headline_starters: What [athlete type] know about [outcome] that you don't
The [product] that [specific result] without [common pain point]
Why the best [activity] in the world choose [brand]
If you're still [old behavior], you're missing out
This [product category] changed how I [activity] forever
